name: vault
description: Encrypted document exchange. AES-256-GCM, client-side encryption, zero-knowledge server.
author: Giuseppe Giona

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vault/web && npm run build -w @vault/api
scripts.test: npm run test -w @vault/web && npm run test -w @vault/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @vault/web && npm run lint -w @vault/api
